description: Style NoteThese sandals from woodland celebrate the true spirit of adventure and are designed for comfort under extreme conditions.Product DetailsSandals with horizontal straps with branding and velcro closure, one detachable strapWell cushioned foot-bed for all-day comfortPadded lining for soft touch and protection from blistersTPU outsole with geometric lugs, reinforced onto the upper at the toeMaterial and CareNubuckUse a branded leather conditioner and polish on leather partsUse a suede brush to remove dist from suede partsDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
